title: Trump alleges China interference in US elections amid suspicion he's prepping for mid-term loss
summary_full: President Donald Trump alleged China compromised American election data extensively. He claimed Beijing illicitly acquired millions of US voter files. Critics questioned these claims, citing public data availability and intelligence assessments. Intelligence agencies concluded China did not attempt to alter vote counts. The timing of these allegations raised concerns among Republicans and Democrats.
